name: ECS Cluster
description: Amazon Elastic Container Service cluster for running containers

inputs.name: cluster_name
inputs.label: Cluster Name
inputs.description: Name of the ECS cluster (up to 255 letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores)

inputs.name: create_cloudwatch_log_group
inputs.label: Create CloudWatch Log Group
inputs.description: Create a CloudWatch log group for the cluster's container insights and execute command logs

inputs.name: cloudwatch_log_group_retention_in_days
inputs.label: Log Retention (days)
inputs.description: Number of days to retain CloudWatch log events

inputs.name: cloudwatch_log_group_name
inputs.label: Log Group Name
inputs.description: Custom name for the CloudWatch Log Group. If not set, uses /aws/ecs/{cluster_name}

inputs.name: cloudwatch_log_group_kms_key_id
inputs.label: Log Group KMS Key ARN
inputs.description: KMS Key ARN for encrypting CloudWatch Log Group

inputs.name: cluster_setting
inputs.label: Cluster Settings (JSON)
inputs.description: List of settings to configure on the cluster, e.g. enable Container Insights

inputs.name: cluster_configuration
inputs.label: Execute Command Config (JSON)
inputs.description: Configuration for ECS Exec (execute command) on the cluster

inputs.name: cluster_service_connect_defaults
inputs.label: Service Connect Namespace (JSON)
inputs.description: Default Service Connect namespace for the cluster

inputs.name: cluster_capacity_providers
inputs.label: Capacity Providers (JSON)
inputs.description: Map of capacity providers and their default strategy settings
